$comment: Canonical MCP server topology, projected into every harness by `pok sync`. This is the ONE file you edit to add/remove servers. Secrets live as ${VAR} placeholders only — never paste raw credentials here. Real values go in common/mcp/secrets.env (gitignored). Optional per-server `targets` restricts which harnesses receive it (default: all). Live servers on ids this file doesn't own are flagged at sync: delete them, or let sync record them under `unmanaged` (per harness) to leave them alone.
